entries.title:
About Students spend two lessons each week deepening their understanding of the parts of speech. During the other two lessons, students grow their writing skills with composition assignments from their books. Throughout the year they explore literary concepts such as point of view and experiment with multiple forms of writing, including letters, descriptions, short accounts, and poetry.

This topic is included in the following course(s): Language Study: Grade 8

entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: combined with the writing practice students continue to gain through written narrations and additional composition assignments (see the Written Narration/Composition Tracker and assignments)

entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: reinforce concepts and build fluency with various types of written forms.

entries.content: If your student did not do Paragraph Town last year, you should incorporate that book with the 8th-grade grammar book.
